_comment: Star Wars themed Discord layout for Order 66 clan server. Target server ID: 1471072707524296767. Consumed by discord/setup_server.py or imported into Xenon. Discord channel types: 0=text, 2=voice, 4=category.
_tagline: Destiny voyager optimizer · wishlist organizer · API stat tracking
_naming_convention: Star Wars themed names. Channel topics describe the actual purpose so members don't get lost.

roles.name: Emperor's Royal Guard
roles._purpose: Co-admins / trusted lieutenants — elite tier between Emperor and mods

roles.name: Imperial Trooper
roles._purpose: Clan members — gated access to Imperial Troopers category

roles.name: Unverified
roles._purpose: Default on join — sees only gateway

categories.name: 📋 In a Galaxy Far Far Away
categories._purpose: Gateway / new members — visible to Unverified

channels.name: welcome
channels.topic: Start here. Read the law → pick your roles → introduce yourself.

channels.name: imperial-law
channels.topic: Server rules. Read before chatting. (rules)

channels.name: the-council
channels.topic: Meet the mods + active members.

channels.name: in-a-galaxy-far-far-away
channels.topic: Introductions. Tell us who you are, your platform, your time zone.

channels.name: galactic-standard-time
channels.topic: Find people in your time zone. Pick a TZ role in #recruitment-roles.

channels.name: recruitment-roles
channels.topic: React to messages here to assign yourself roles — clan status, platform, dungeon/raid experience, time zone. (formerly: pick-roles)

categories.name: 📣 Imperial Declarations
categories._setup_note: Set as Discord announcement channel type if available. Restrict 'send messages' to Death Star Command + Emperor only.

channels.name: imperial-declarations
channels.topic: Server announcements, release notes, important pings. Read-only for members.

categories.name: 🎫 Galactic Senate
categories._setup_note: Invite TicketTool.xyz (https://tickettool.xyz/) and run /setup in #bounty-office to enable private tickets.

channels.name: bounty-office
channels.topic: Open a private ticket here for mod help. Powered by TicketTool.xyz.

categories.name: 🚀 The Imperial Armory
categories._purpose: Destiny Voyager app + toolkit support (the Order 66 clan's app)
categories._setup_note: Restrict view to verified roles (Imperial Trooper / Rebel Ally / Padawan).

channels.name: destiny-voyager
channels.topic: 📌 Destiny Voyager — the Order 66 clan app. Latest .exe pinned at top. Download, setup steps, and FAQ here.

channels.name: smugglers-cache
channels.topic: Older releases, DIM CSV templates, manifest backups.

channels.name: engineering-bay
channels.topic: Destiny Voyager support — bug reports, install help, questions.

channels.name: imperial-briefings
channels.topic: Release notes + version pings for Destiny Voyager.

channels.name: senate-polls
channels.topic: Quick 2-day polls on builds, features, meta. (formerly: 2-day-polls)

channels.name: the-cantina
channels.topic: General chat — like the Mos Eisley Cantina.

channels.name: cantina-tables
channels.topic: Find buddies, mentors, fireteam regulars.

categories.name: ⚔️ Imperial Troopers
categories._setup_note: Restrict ALL channels here to @Imperial Trooper role only. This is your clan-private space.

channels.name: trooper-comms
channels.topic: Clan-only chat. (Imperial Trooper role required)

channels.name: clan-events
channels.topic: Clan event scheduling, raid nights, GM runs.

channels.name: trooper-builds
channels.topic: Internal build sharing. Clan-only DIM URLs.

channels.name: mandalorian-warriors
channels.topic: Titan builds — armored Mando-style. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.name: the-bad-batch
channels.topic: Hunter builds — elite specialists. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.name: jedi-order
channels.topic: Warlock builds — Force users. Drop DIM share URLs.

channels.topic: LFG — story missions, campaign coop, exotic missions.

channels.topic: LFG — Crucible, Trials, Iron Banner, Competitive.

channels.topic: Set up private matches.
